title: InnoDB Log File Size Errors During Import
description: Large imports can exceed InnoDB log capacity. Here’s how to reduce the load.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: If InnoDB log files are too small, big imports can stall or fail under heavy write load.
What you can do without server access
Split the dump into smaller chunks so each import generates less log activity.
Related: **MySQL Error 2006: Server Has Gone Away**.

content.title: Reduce import load
content.text: Split large dumps into smaller, safer batches.

faq.question: Can I change InnoDB log file size?
faq.answer: Only if you control the server configuration.
